name: count_trailing_zeros
cpp_unit: long ctz64(uint64_t n){ if(n==0) return 64; long c=0; while((n&1ULL)==0ULL){ c++; n>>=1; } return c; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", ctz64(0ULL)); printf("%ld
", ctz64(1ULL)); printf("%ld
", ctz64(8ULL)); printf("%ld
", ctz64(48ULL)); printf("%ld
", ctz64(1ULL<<63)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(ctz64(0))
    print(ctz64(1))
    print(ctz64(8))
    print(ctz64(48))
    print(ctz64(UInt64(1) << 63))

name: count_leading_zeros
cpp_unit: long clz64(uint64_t n){ if(n==0) return 64; long c=0; uint64_t mask=1ULL<<63; while((n&mask)==0ULL){ c++; mask>>=1; } return c; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", clz64(0ULL)); printf("%ld
", clz64(1ULL)); printf("%ld
", clz64(255ULL)); printf("%ld
", clz64(1ULL<<63)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(clz64(0))
    print(clz64(1))
    print(clz64(255))
    print(clz64(UInt64(1) << 63))

name: reverse_bits
cpp_unit: uint64_t reverse_bits(uint64_t n){ uint64_t r=0; for(int i=0;i<64;i++){ r=(r<<1)|(n&1ULL); n>>=1; } return r; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)reverse_bits(1ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)reverse_bits(0ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)reverse_bits(0xFFULL)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(reverse_bits(1))
    print(reverse_bits(0))
    print(reverse_bits(0xFF))

name: next_power_of_two
cpp_unit: uint64_t next_pow2(uint64_t n){ if(n<=1) return 1; uint64_t p=1; while(p<n) p<<=1; return p; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)next_pow2(0ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)next_pow2(5ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)next_pow2(16ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)next_pow2(17ULL)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(next_pow2(0))
    print(next_pow2(5))
    print(next_pow2(16))
    print(next_pow2(17))

name: parity
cpp_unit: int parity(uint64_t n){ int p=0; while(n){ p^=(int)(n&1ULL); n>>=1; } return p; }
mojo_unit:
def parity(n: UInt64) -> Int:
    var p = 0
    var x = n
    while x != 0:
        p ^= Int(x & 1)
        x >>= 1
    return p
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", parity(0ULL)); printf("%d
", parity(7ULL)); printf("%d
", parity(8ULL)); printf("%d
", parity(255ULL)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(parity(0))
    print(parity(7))
    print(parity(8))
    print(parity(255))

name: gray_binary
cpp_unit:
uint64_t binary_to_gray(uint64_t n){ return n^(n>>1); }
uint64_t gray_to_binary(uint64_t g){ uint64_t b=0; while(g){ b^=g; g>>=1; } return b; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)binary_to_gray(0ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)binary_to_gray(5ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)gray_to_binary(7ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)gray_to_binary(binary_to_gray(42ULL))); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(binary_to_gray(0))
    print(binary_to_gray(5))
    print(gray_to_binary(7))
    print(gray_to_binary(binary_to_gray(42)))

name: gcd_rec
cpp_unit: long gcd_rec(long a, long b){ if(b==0) return a; return gcd_rec(b, a%b); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", gcd_rec(48,18)); printf("%ld
", gcd_rec(17,5)); printf("%ld
", gcd_rec(100,10)); printf("%ld
", gcd_rec(7,0)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(gcd_rec(48, 18))
    print(gcd_rec(17, 5))
    print(gcd_rec(100, 10))
    print(gcd_rec(7, 0))

name: power_rec
cpp_unit: long power_rec(long base, long exp){ if(exp==0) return 1; return base*power_rec(base, exp-1); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", power_rec(2,10)); printf("%ld
", power_rec(3,4)); printf("%ld
", power_rec(5,0)); printf("%ld
", power_rec(7,3)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(power_rec(2, 10))
    print(power_rec(3, 4))
    print(power_rec(5, 0))
    print(power_rec(7, 3))

name: sum_digits_rec
cpp_unit: long sum_digits_rec(long n){ if(n<10) return n; return n%10 + sum_digits_rec(n/10); }
cpp_driver:

", sum_digits_rec(0)); printf("%ld

", sum_digits_rec(99999)); return 0; }

    print(sum_digits_rec(12345))
    print(sum_digits_rec(99999))

name: tower_of_hanoi_moves

name: catalan_rec
cpp_unit: long catalan(long n){ if(n<=1) return 1; long r=0; for(long i=0;i<n;i++) r+=catalan(i)*catalan(n-1-i); return r; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", catalan(0)); printf("%ld
", catalan(1)); printf("%ld
", catalan(5)); printf("%ld
", catalan(9)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(catalan(0))
    print(catalan(1))
    print(catalan(5))
    print(catalan(9))

name: fizzbuzz_count
cpp_unit: long fizzbuzz_count(long n){ long c=0; for(long i=1;i<=n;i++){ if(i%15==0) c+=3; else if(i%3==0) c+=1; else if(i%5==0) c+=2; } return c; }
cpp_driver:

", fizzbuzz_count(15)); printf("%ld
", fizzbuzz_count(0)); printf("%ld
", fizzbuzz_count(100)); return 0; }

    print(fizzbuzz_count(0))

name: days_in_month
cpp_unit: int days_in_month(int m, int leap){ if(m==2) return leap? 29:28; if(m==4||m==6||m==9||m==11) return 30; return 31; }

name: clamp_int
cpp_unit: long clamp_int(long x, long lo, long hi){ if(x<lo) return lo; if(x>hi) return hi; return x; }

name: dispatch_op
cpp_unit: long dispatch_op(int op, long a, long b){ switch(op){ case 0: return a+b; case 1: return a-b; case 2: return a*b; case 3: return (b!=0)? a/b : 0; default: return -1; } }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", dispatch_op(0,6,4)); printf("%ld
", dispatch_op(1,6,4)); printf("%ld
", dispatch_op(2,6,4)); printf("%ld
", dispatch_op(3,12,4)); printf("%ld
", dispatch_op(3,5,0)); printf("%ld
", dispatch_op(9,1,1)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(dispatch_op(0, 6, 4))
    print(dispatch_op(1, 6, 4))
    print(dispatch_op(2, 6, 4))
    print(dispatch_op(3, 12, 4))
    print(dispatch_op(3, 5, 0))
    print(dispatch_op(9, 1, 1))

name: collatz_steps_capped
cpp_unit: long collatz(long n, long cap){ long steps=0; while(n!=1 && steps<cap){ if(n%2==0) n/=2; else n=3*n+1; steps++; } return steps; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", collatz(1,100)); printf("%ld
", collatz(6,100)); printf("%ld
", collatz(27,200)); printf("%ld
", collatz(7,3)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(collatz(1, 100))
    print(collatz(6, 100))
    print(collatz(27, 200))
    print(collatz(7, 3))

name: nested_loop_count
cpp_unit: long nested_loop_count(long n){ long c=0; for(long i=0;i<n;i++){ for(long j=i;j<n;j++){ if((i+j)%2==0) c++; } } return c; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", nested_loop_count(1)); printf("%ld
", nested_loop_count(4)); printf("%ld
", nested_loop_count(10)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(nested_loop_count(1))
    print(nested_loop_count(4))
    print(nested_loop_count(10))
